column1: 1,"Visit the Eiffel Tower","The iconic iron lady of Paris, offering breathtaking views of the city."
2,"Explore the Louvre Museum","Home to the Mona Lisa and many other famous artworks from around the world."
3,"Walk along the Seine River","Take a romantic stroll or boat ride along the City of Light's picturesque river."
4,"Visit Notre-Dame Cathedral","A beautiful Gothic church that has stood for centuries, with stunning architecture and history."
5,"Discover Montmartre","The charming neighborhood known for its bohemian vibe, street artists, and stunning views from the top."
6,"Shop at Galeries Lafayette or Le Bon Marché","Indulge in luxury shopping and take in the stunning views of the city from these iconic department stores."
7,"Visit the Arc de Triomphe","A monumental arch that honors the soldiers who fought and died for France, with great views of the city."
8,"Enjoy a cabaret show at the Moulin Rouge or Lido","Experience the magic of Parisian nightlife with a classic cabaret performance."
9,"Take a day trip to Versailles","Visit the opulent palace and gardens that were once home to French royalty, just outside the city."
10,"Explore the trendy Marais neighborhood","Discover the hipster vibe, street art, and charming cafes in this up-and-coming Parisian district."
